Entry.JapaneseText: スパーダ
Entry.EnglishText: Spada

Entry.JapaneseText: ルカ
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: っしゃ、準備万端ぬかりなしってな！
Entry.EnglishText: Alrighty, everything's ready an' I didn't forget a thing!

Entry.JapaneseText: いきなりついてこいって… なんなのスパーダ？
Entry.EnglishText: Asking me to go with you out of the blue like this... What's going on, Spada?

Entry.JapaneseText: ぼんやりしてんじゃねェよ、 これから大事な勝負なんだからよ
Entry.EnglishText: Don't just stand there like a dummy. I'm goin' 'cause this is an important contest.

Entry.JapaneseText: しょ、勝負！？ なんで！？
Entry.EnglishText: C-Contest?! What do you mean?!

Entry.JapaneseText: 決まってんだろ、 俺達がイノセンス代表だからだよ
Entry.EnglishText: Ain't it obvious? I'm talkin' about us bein' the representatives for Innocence.

Entry.JapaneseText: だ、代表？ 何で？ というか、何の？？ だって、みんな今ちょうど 遊んでくれてるところなのに？
Entry.EnglishText: R-Representatives? Why? What does that mean??? I mean, everyone is playing the game right now, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: お、そりゃありがてェな。 恩に着るぜ！ けどよ、正直ものたりねェ奴もいんだろ？ なァ？
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah, an' I'm grateful they are. Much obliged! But there're some of 'em who just genuinely ain't gonna think it's enough, y'know? Right?

Entry.JapaneseText: そ、そんなこと…
Entry.EnglishText: Th-That's not true...

Entry.JapaneseText: そこでお待ちかね、 俺達の新たなる大活躍を 紹介してやろうってェ話だ
Entry.EnglishText: And so, I hereby introduce ya to our long awaited, new, spectacular exploits.

Entry.JapaneseText: 新たなる？
Entry.EnglishText: New?

Entry.JapaneseText: ま、やってみりゃわかるって。 つーワケで、行くぜェ、ルカ！
Entry.EnglishText: Well, you'll get what I mean when ya see it. An' with that said, let's go, Ruca!

Entry.JapaneseText: い、行くって、だ、誰と戦うつもりなの？
Entry.EnglishText: L-Let's go, you say... Wh-Who are we fighting?

Entry.JapaneseText: ユーリとフレンって野郎どもだ
Entry.EnglishText: Those bastards, Yuri and Flynn.

Entry.JapaneseText: それってヴェスペリアの人達じゃない！ 同じ「テイルズ オブ」の仲間なのに、 どうして？
Entry.EnglishText: Aren't they the guys from Vesperia?! We're all companions from the same "Tales of" series, so why?

Entry.JapaneseText: 別に命のやりとりするワケじゃねェよ。 勝負だって最初っから言ってんだろ？ ちょいとシメとくだけだから心配すンな
Entry.EnglishText: We ain't takin' their lives or somethin'. I told ya it was a contest right from the beginnin', didn't I? We're just gonna knock 'em down a peg, so don't sweat it.

Entry.JapaneseText: し、シメるって…
Entry.EnglishText: "Kn-Knock down a peg"...

Entry.JapaneseText: あいつら人気がハンパねぇからって、 どーも調子に乗ってやがる
Entry.EnglishText: They're insanely popular, and it's gettin' to their heads.

Entry.JapaneseText: だからよ、今のうちに、ここは先輩として 一発ビシッと決めといてやろうじゃねェか
Entry.EnglishText: So like, while we've got the chance to, shouldn't we get a clean shot in at 'em as their seniors to the series?

Entry.JapaneseText: でも…
Entry.EnglishText: But...

Entry.JapaneseText: だーっ、ウダウダしてんじゃねぇよ！ いいから行くぜっ！
Entry.EnglishText: AHHH, stop dawdling! C'mon an' let's go!

Entry.JapaneseText: ぅわっ！
Entry.EnglishText: Whoa!

Entry.JapaneseText: ヒャッヒャッヒャッ、腕が鳴るぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hyahahahehe! Can't wait to show 'em my skills!
Entry.Notes: Will adjust the laugh as needed based on the acting.

Entry.JapaneseText: BG02a.ppt
